data.title: Cognizant and Domyn Announce Strategic Partnership to Deliver Sovereign AI Solutions Across EMEA
data.description: In a recent collaboration, Domyn's chip-to-application AI infrastructure will be joined with Cognizant's enterprise integration skills and EMEA industry coverage. This partnership aims to empower regulated firms to securely implement AI both on-premise and within sovereign environments. The alliance, announced in London on July 2, 2026, signifies a significant step towards ensuring AI deployment meets regulatory standards, offering a comprehensive solution for organizations looking to leverage AI technologies.
74Software had a total of 100,000 voting rights and shares in its share capital as of June 30, 2026.

data.title: RWS launches Trados Studio 2026, delivering major advances in AI, performance and productivity for language professionals
data.description: A cutting-edge update has been unveiled, featuring advanced architecture, AI with context awareness, upgraded terminology management, and enhanced workspace experience. Revealed on July 2, 2026, in Maidenhead, England, global AI solutions company RWS introduced Trados Studio 2026. This release marks the integration of next-generation technology in language processing and workspace optimization.

data.title: Intesa Sanpaolo Brings its Digital Infrastructure to Google Cloud Regions in Italy Hosted in TIM's Data Centers
data.description: A strategic project enabling next-generation data analytics and artificial intelligence has been completed by the Intesa Sanpaolo Group in Milan and Turin. The group finalized the cloud migration of its core IT infrastructure. This achievement marks a significant milestone in advancing their technological capabilities.

data.title: OCI N.V. statement on NNS
data.description: On July 2, 2026, OCI Global N.V. ("OCI"), listed on Euronext with the ticker OCI, confirmed the receipt of a statement from NNS Holding (Cyprus) Limited ("NNS"). The statement is being shared by OCI solely for informational purposes without any further remarks or support. The content within the statement is available for public access.

data.title: Oculis to Participate at the Piper Sandler Virtual Ophthalmology Conference
data.description: Today, in Zug, Switzerland, on July 2, 2026, Oculis Holding AG, a global biopharmaceutical company concentrating on neuro-ophthalmic and ophthalmic disease solutions where medical needs remain unmet, disclosed their involvement at the Piper Sandler Virtual Ophthalmology Conference. The company's management team will partake in a fireside discussion at the event. Oculis is listed under the ticker symbols Nasdaq: OCS and XICE: OCS.

data.title: Share Buyback Transaction Details June 25 – July 1, 2026
data.description: Today, Wolters Kluwer announced the repurchase of 110,222 of its ordinary shares between June 25 and July 1, 2026.

data.title: BIO-key Showcases Passwordless & Biometric Identity Solutions at Jordan Banking Cybersecurity Workshop in Amman on July 6th
data.description: BIO-key (BKYI), a prominent company specializing in biometric-based identity and access management solutions, will be taking part in the Jordan Banking Cybersecurity Workshop in Amman on July 6. The workshop aims to address critical cybersecurity issues facing the banking sector and will provide a platform for industry leaders to share insights and strategies. BIO-key's involvement underscores its position as a key player in the global biometric security market. This event will offer valuable networking opportunities and a chance to showcase the company's innovative solutions to a targeted audience. The workshop is expected to draw significant participation from industry experts, with an estimated attendance of over 100 professionals from the banking and cybersecurity fields.

data.title: Invitation presentation of Boliden's Q2 2026 report
data.description: Boliden is set to release its Interim Report for the second quarter of 2026 on July 21 at 07:30 (CEST) in Stockholm. Following this, a press and analyst conference is scheduled for the same day at 09:30 (CEST), where the report will be presented by Mikael, Boliden's President and CEO.

data.title: Peakmedia digital signage GmbH rebrands as ZetaDisplay Austria and appoints Marcel Schramm as Country Director
data.description: Peakmedia has recently undergone a rebranding and will now be operating under the new name ZetaDisplay Austria. This strategic move aims to propel the expansion of digital signage and retail media solutions in the region. Marcel Schramm has been selected as the Country Director to spearhead this initiative and drive growth in this sector. This change signifies a significant transition for the company as it continues to solidify its presence in the market.
